# Tables

## Simple Table

| Name | Type | Default |
|------|------|---------|
| margin | string | 1in |
| font-size | string | 11pt |
| toc | bool | true |

## Wide Table

| Column A | Column B | Column C | Column D | Column E | Column F |
|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|----------|
| alpha | beta | gamma | delta | epsilon | zeta |
| one | two | three | four | five | six |
| foo | bar | baz | qux | quux | corge |

## Alignment

| Left | Center | Right |
|:-----|:------:|------:|
| a | b | c |
| longer text | centered | 42 |
